title: Submaximal properties in (strongly) topological gyrogroups
abstract: A space $X$ is submaximal if any dense subset of $X$ is open. In this paper, we prove that every submaximal topological gyrogroup of non-measurable cardinality is strongly $σ$-discrete. Moreover, we prove that every submaximal strongly topological gyrogroup of non-measurable cardinality is hereditarily paracompact.
comment: 14 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.02633
